description: Canonical rule checklist extracted from all CLAUDE.md files in the KMP ecosystem. Used by validate-claude-md MCP tool and smoke tests.

rules.rule: Default hierarchy template is automatic since Kotlin 1.9.20 -- only call applyDefaultHierarchyTemplate() explicitly when reapplying after custom source set configuration
commonMain: Pure Kotlin ONLY (no android.*, java.*, platform.* imports)
jvmMain: Shared JVM code when Android + Desktop need same impl -- DO NOT duplicate code across androidMain + desktopMain
appleMain: Shared Apple code when iOS + macOS need same impl -- DO NOT duplicate code across iosMain + macosMain
FLAT module names: core-json-api, core-network-ktor (NOT nested core-json:api) -- AGP 9+ circular dependency bug
File naming by source set: commonMain .kt, jvmMain .jvm.kt, appleMain .apple.kt, androidMain .android.kt, desktopMain .desktop.kt
5-layer architecture: UI (Compose/SwiftUI) > ViewModel (UiState/events) > Domain (UseCases/Repository interfaces) > Data (Repository impls/DataSources) > Model (data classes/enums/sealed types)
Layer dependency direction: UI depends on ViewModel, ViewModel on UseCases, Domain on Model, Data on Domain + Platform. Model depends on nothing
Use com.example.shared.core.result.Result<T> for all operations
ALWAYS rethrow CancellationException in catch blocks
DomainException hierarchy from core-error for typed errors
UiState: ALWAYS sealed interface (NEVER data class with boolean flags)
Expose UiState via StateFlow with stateIn(WhileSubscribed(5_000))
Ephemeral events: state-based (nullable UiState field + onEventConsumed callback, NOT Channel or MutableSharedFlow)
Navigation: State-driven (NOT Channel-based)
NO platform deps in ViewModels (no Context, Resources, UIKit)
UiText for user-facing strings (StringResource / DynamicString)
Pure-Kotlin fakes over mocks (FakeRepository, FakeClock)
runTest for ALL coroutine tests
Sequential execution: maxParallelForks = 1 (file locking on Windows)
StateFlow: subscribe in backgroundScope with UnconfinedTestDispatcher BEFORE actions
Schedulers: test via triggerNow(), NEVER test infinite loops directly
Inject testDispatcher into UseCases (not Dispatchers.Default)
Koin 4.1.1 for dependency injection
Module declarations in each module's di/ package
koinViewModel() in Compose
Koin before Activity launch in tests
Navigation3 (androidx.navigation3) with @Serializable routes for Android + Desktop Compose
iOS/macOS use native SwiftUI NavigationStack
Resources MUST be in src/commonMain/composeResources/ (NOT custom source sets)
generateResClass = always for multi-module + composite builds
Composite builds: includeBuild("../your-shared-libs") with dependencySubstitution
Version catalog from the shared library project is canonical; consumer projects reference it via composite build
Convention plugins in build-logic/ for module boilerplate
Kover for coverage
Each teammate works on their OWN feature branch (never develop or main)
DO NOT merge into develop -- the lead handles all merges
DO NOT rebase onto develop -- the lead handles conflict resolution
Branch naming: feature/{milestone}-{module}
Worktree agents MUST stay in their worktree directory -- never cd to the main working tree
Teammates MUST NOT edit files owned by another teammate -- file ownership follows module boundaries
Shared files (build.gradle.kts, DI modules) require lead coordination
AndroidCommonDoc is the L0 pattern toolkit: L0 (generic) -> L1 (shared libs, ecosystem) -> L2 (apps, project-specific)
MCP server in mcp-server/ -- Node.js TypeScript, tested with Vitest, exposes pattern docs, skills registry, validation tools
Resources use docs:// URI scheme
Skills in skills/*/SKILL.md with frontmatter (allowed-tools, description); agents in skills/agents/*/AGENT.md
Registry: skills/registry.json catalogs all L0 skills, agents, commands
L1/L2 projects consume L0 via l0-manifest.json + /sync-l0 skill
Pattern docs in docs/ with domain-based subdirectories -- all docs have YAML frontmatter (scope, sources, targets, category, slug)
Hub docs <100 lines, sub-docs <300 lines, absolute max 500 lines
Cross-references use relative paths between subdirectories
Vault sync: config at ~/.androidcommondoc/vault-config.json, files use lowercase-kebab-case naming

notes: L0 global (42 rules) covers all shared KMP behavioral rules
L0 toolkit (10 rules) covers AndroidCommonDoc-specific toolkit identity
L1/L2 rules are defined in each project's own CLAUDE.md -- not stored here
Total: 52 L0 rules across 2 files, 12 categories
